rationale: Both reviews agree on the True-placeholder blocks; Review 1's additional finding on IsUnipotent is more precisely grounded in the diff (unused AlgPoints type vs GroupLike in the actual definition, docstring/type mismatch) and leads to a concrete, actionable fix, whereas Review 2's alternative framing of that finding proposes a vague 'representation-theoretic' replacement that is harder for the author to act on.
